What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Three effigies dressed in white jumpsuits burn on wooden crosses while white smoke rises into the air. A crowd of people wearing winter coats stands behind the flames holding large banners with Korean text. Red and white flags wave on poles in front of a grey building facade with rectangular windows. A blue news banner with Russian text overlays the bottom of the screen.

Describe the sequence of events shown in the video, focusing on the building, the flags, the burning effigies, and the protesters' actions.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a large white building stands static under a blue sky; at 4s, three flags including a South Korean flag wave in front of the facade; at 8s, three effigies dressed in white jumpsuits burn on wooden crosses; at 14s, a gloved hand reaches into a plastic bag held by another person; at 16s, a man in the background raises his right fist while holding a banner.
